allow: PowerShell(@\(14360, 11568, 11484, 7320\) | ForEach-Object { $id = $_; $cmd = \(Get-WmiObject Win32_Process -Filter "ProcessId=$id" -ErrorAction SilentlyContinue\).CommandLine; "PID $id \(port $\(netstat -ano 2>$null | findstr "LISTENING" | Where-Object { $_ -match "\\s$id$" } | ForEach-Object { \($_ -split '\\s+'\)[2] }\)\): $cmd" })
